title: NULL_SCREEN TPB BTCUSDT 4h -> NO_EDGE_DETECTED (n=0-3 per draw - frequency starved)
content: Null screen on TPB (BTCUSDT 4h, n_draws=8, seed=42). Verdict: NO_EDGE_DETECTED. Max PF=0.0, n_trades=0-3 per draw. Frequency starvation CONFIRMED at 4h native interval. The TPB entry mechanism (EMA50>EMA200 stack + EMA20 pullback within ATR tolerance + reclaim candle quality score >= 0.55) generates almost no signals at 4h granularity on BTCUSDT. Root cause: 4h EMA50>EMA200 trend alignment is rare AND pullback to EMA20 within ATR is very selective at this granularity. TPB is frequency-starved at ALL tested intervals: 1h (n=2-32 cross-TF bottleneck) and 4h (n=0-3 native). Strategy must be considered DISCARDED for BTCUSDT at all available intervals.

verdict.reason: n_trades=0-3 per draw; frequency starvation confirmed at 4h native interval

structured_data.tpb_status: DISCARDED - frequency starved at all tested intervals (1h cross-TF n=2-32, 4h native n=0-3)
